concepts.name: Shared, label-agnostic MLS removal helper (cancelPendingInvitationImpl)
concepts.defect_fixed: VQ-S9-P1 — pre-check gated on pending (in-tree AND no-profile) → no-op'd Remove Member on confirmed members. Lead loosened it to tree-membership-only; isPendingMemberImpl left intact for MarmotContext.isPendingMember. Regression test added to cancelInvitationImpl.test.ts (confirmed-member → commits, not raceDetected).

concepts.name: MarmotContext method-exposure convention (type / useCallback boundary / useMemo value+deps / DEFAULT_MARMOT fallback)
Member-row label mutual exclusion (Cancel Invite XOR Remove Member, never both/neither for an admin-visible non-self row)
Write-before-invite, best-effort, clear-on-failure marker convention at direct-invite call sites
profile.tsx handleAddToGroup marker-write mirror of the InviteMemberModal convention

stories.boundary_check: PASS — pure idb-keyval storage module; zero imports from app/src/context/.
notes: loadPendingDirectInviteMarkers returns Set<string> of pubkeys — matches PendingDirectInviteMarkerSet seam (S5 getPendingDirectInvites).
clearPendingDirectInvite (per-key) is the PendingDirectInviteClearFn seam S4 profileHandler injects.
Two distinct bulk-clear exports, NO '*' sentinel: S2 calls clearAllPendingDirectInvites(); S3 calls clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup(groupId). Watch for wrong-scope call at those seams.
markPendingDirectInvite lets IDB throws propagate by design; best-effort log-and-proceed is the S7/S8 call-site responsibility (AC-MARKER-2).
Lead applied 2 sub-threshold review fixes: removed unused `get` import; added prefix-of-groupId isolation test (11 tests green).

stories.boundary_check: PASS — storage→storage import (pendingDirectInviteStorage into groupStorage); no context reach-in.

seam_resolutions.detail: clearAllGroupData calls zero-arg clearAllPendingDirectInvites() (account-wide), not the per-group clear.

notes: deleteMemberProfile: read-filter-rewrite, case-INsensitive pubkeyHex match, no-op-write when unchanged. AC-PURGE-1 satisfied.

CASE-SENSITIVITY ASYMMETRY (deliberate, low risk): deleteMemberProfile matches case-insensitively; mergeMemberProfile matches case-sensitively. Safe under canonical lowercase nostr pubkeys. WATCH at S9: the marker clear is exact-key ${groupId}:${pubkey} — pass the SAME identity to deleteMemberProfile and clearPendingDirectInvite or an orphan marker survives.

Lead remediated reviewer sev-5: the .clearAllGroupData.test.ts idb mock was shared-Map (clear ignored store arg) → test was vacuous (passed even without line 135). Rewrote mock per-store (vi.hoisted, each createStore gets its own Map) so removing the marker-clear wiring now fails the test. 10 tests green.

seam_resolutions.detail: per-KEY clear, merge-result-independent (outside if(merged)), gated on signedEvent presence (clear-on-rumor.pubkey-alone structurally impossible). AC-MARKER-5/6 satisfied.

cross_story_dependencies.detail: S4 clears marker AFTER setProfileVersion → transient (confirmed profile + marker present) is safe ONLY if label = isPending && markerSet.has(pubkey). If label keys on marker alone, invariant #1 breaks.

notes: AC-MARKER-4 exclusion proven at two layers: approveJoinRequestImpl's Deps has NO marker-write field (structural), + real-store (fake-indexeddb) empty-before/empty-after test on both nickname branches.

UNACTIONED (sev-2, deliberate): redundant dynamic import at :1915 (S4 already static-imports the module at :46 → no code-splitting benefit). Left as-is: functionally correct, matches sibling read-method convention; not worth re-churning MarmotContext.

seam_resolutions.detail: S7 writes/clears under lowercased pubkey; lead additionally normalized markerKey in the S1 store so casing is store-enforced, not per-call-site convention. Finding B closed.

findings.detail: throw-path orphan: inviteByNpub throwing (vs {ok:false}) does not clear the marker. Accepted: a partial-Add-then-throw means the member IS in the tree, so 'Cancel Invite' is correct; invariant #4 hides any true orphan. Clearing on throw could be wrong. Left as-is intentionally.
casing normalization was caller-side convention → moved into markerKey (store). S8 no longer needs to remember .toLowerCase().

stories.boundary_check: PASS — page consuming storage directly (allowed); injectable wrapper mirrors S7.

seam_resolutions.detail: markerKey lowercases pubkey at store level (implemented+tested). S8 relies on it (no caller-side .toLowerCase()). Validated at the 2nd write site.
mirrors S7; AC-MARKER-1/2/3; inviteByNpub unmodified (approve stays marker-free).

findings.detail: throw-path orphan (S7-A analog, marginally larger — pubkeyToNpub has no hex validation). Accepted: defended by invariant #4; pubkeyHex is a validated route identity here.

stories.boundary_check: PASS — groups.tsx consumes storage directly (UI layer); purge/marker-clear attach in the caller AFTER removal, gated on post-hoc tree-membership, never in the pure impl.

blocking_finding.detail: cancelPendingInvitationImpl's isPendingMemberImpl pre-check no-op'd Remove Member on confirmed members (its target population) → architecture guarantee #3 (no-stuck-unremovable) violated. Lead fix: gate pre-check on tree-membership only; isPendingMemberImpl untouched (still backs isPendingMember label derivation); regression test added. 3-agent consensus (architect+examiner+reviewer) on the diagnosis and fix. Full unit suite green (3618).

stories.order_sensitive_verification: runPostRemovalCleanup gates SOLELY on stillMember (live re-read via getLiveMemberPubkeys), never result.ok/raceDetected. Both raceDetected shapes still purge (mutant-killers); failure+still-member does NOT (AC-PURGE-4). Marker Set refreshes on profileVersion/groupDataVersion → invariant #1 UI-freshness loop closed.

findings.detail: S9 suite mocked the removal helper, hiding P1; regression added to the impl's own suite.

surfaces_touched.rendering: Remove Member button (remove-member-${prefix}) + confirm dialog (remove-member-confirm-${prefix} on inner Button); label mutex

stories.boundary_check: PASS — presentational; selectMemberRowAffordance is a pure exported predicate; no MarmotContext import (tested); copy via useCopy().

seam_resolutions.detail: cancel-invite ONLY on isPending && hasMarker (conjunction, never marker alone); confirmed+lingering-marker → remove-member. isPending leg hides transient/failed S4 clear (invariant #1/#4). AC-LABEL-2..6, AC-UNIV-2, AC-REMOVE-2 satisfied.
cancelInvitationImpl pre-check tree-membership fix confirmed present; Remove Member evicts confirmed members end-to-end.

findings.detail: canonicalize rowKey once for all three identity checks (isYou/isPending/hasMarker) instead of only hasMarker. 44 tests green.

notes: S10 closes the pending-direct-invite lifecycle UI. Invariant #1 loop closed end-to-end: mark(S7/S8) → read once(S9) → label mutex(S10) → clear on own-signed(S4) with profileVersion Set refresh(S9).

stories.boundary_check: PASS — e2e-only; no product code. Publish-through-app except the documented nameless fixture.
stories.runtime_status: GREEN — 24/24 e2e pass on the live relay.

e2e_fixes.root_cause: closing the whole BrowserContext destroyed the invitee's MLS KeyPackage SECRET in IDB → no fresh context could rejoin.
e2e_fixes.fix: test-only: close only the Page (masking-trap intact) so Context IDB survives.
added waitForKeyPackage before the profile-page add; gate on real member-row outcome not the unreachable success Alert.
e2e_fixes.surfaced_bug: BACKLOG profile-page-add-group-success-confirmation — PRE-EXISTING: Add-to-Group widget (incl. success Alert) is mount-gated on addableGroups.length>0 and unmounts when the invite makes the contact a member. Feature works (invite+marker succeed); only the confirmation UI is unreachable. NOT patched (pre-existing, product-behavior; surfaced for user).

stories.coverage: all 8 SCEN + REMOVE-4/PURGE-5/UNIV-1 with discriminating assertions; SCEN-5/7 behaviorally confirm the VQ-S9-P1 fix.

stories.boundary_check: PASS — verification-only; real pure fns + real fake-indexeddb stores (not mocked).

invariant_assessment.INV-1: strengthened by lead (sev-3 finding): primary assertion is now marker-cleared-after-every-ordering (discriminating across all 16), coexistence entailed; failure-mode masking delegated to INV-4.
invariant_assessment.INV-2: GENUINE-STRONG — 3×2 removal-shape×marker + PURGE-4 counter-space + concurrent race; spy-wrapping-real asserts call AND real IDB effect (avoids the S2 vacuity trap).
invariant_assessment.INV-3: GENUINE — full 2×2 admin-non-self rows never 'none'; inviter axis structurally unbranchable.
invariant_assessment.INV-4: GENUINE — viewer×marker with isPending=false never cancel-invite; double-failure (throwing clear) drives a REAL orphan and confirms conjunction masking.

findings.detail: INV-1 enumeration was decorative for its stated failure condition; strengthened to assert marker-cleared across all orderings.

stories.notes: No NEW production defects surfaced by the audit layer — consistent with S1-S11 order-sensitive logic being correct post the S9-P1 fix.

watch_items: CLOSED — S2 vacuous test; S7-B casing (store-level markerKey); S9-P1 confirmed-member no-op (pre-check now tree-membership; regression added); S9 test-gap.
ACCEPTED — S7-A/S8-A throw-path orphan (invariant #4); S5 sev-2 redundant dynamic import.

CRITICAL for S10 — label render MUST be the mutex `isPending && markerSet.has(pubkey)` (conjunction), NEVER marker alone (S4 clears after setProfileVersion; isPending leg hides transient/failed clear). markerSet.has(pubkey) must compare a canonical-lowercase pubkey (Set contents are store-lowercased; MLS memberPubkeys are lowercase).

S10 MemberList render: Cancel-Invite iff (isPending && marker); Remove Member for every OTHER in-tree non-self admin row (universal — now functional post-P1). Mutually exclusive per row. Consume removeMember* via useCopy(); confirm-dialog testid on inner Button (Chakra Modal drops it); remove-member-${prefix} testid convention.
S11 e2e: scenario 1&2 close invitee ctx before approve (masking trap); scenario 5/7 exercise real Remove Member (now works post-P1); seedContact not pairing.ts; groups-*.spec.ts filename.
S12: INV-1..4 property assertions across the assembled flow.
